headline: Nike unsteady as new legal fight brews
summary: Nike’s stock clawed back most of a steep post-earnings drop this week. Days later, a convenience store chain filed a federal lawsuit trying to block one of Nike’s biggest sneaker launches of the summer. The two storylines are unfolding almost simultaneously, but they have nothing to do with each ...

headline: adidas (XTRA:ADS) Stock Looks Cheap Relative To Fair Value
summary: For adidas, the core valuation tension is that a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to the stock trading at a large discount to its implied worth, while traditional market multiples paint it as expensive. This leaves investors to interpret a mixed set of signals after a period of weak long term share price performance. Over the past 5 years, adidas shares have declined 38.6%, which means long term holders have not been rewarded despite more recent strength. Investor...
